description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, polished wooden exterior and a matching round piano stool. The piano features a full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, housed in a rectangular frame with a flat top and slightly curved front legs. The surface of the wood shows some wear and subtle scratches, indicating use and age. The back of the piano is a solid, unadorned wooden panel, while the front displays the keyboard and a closed fallboard. No visible pedals are present beneath the keyboard, and there are no brand markings or logos on the exterior. The piano is accompanied by a simple, round, wooden stool with four curved legs.
description: A dark wooden upright piano with a full keyboard and a matching round stool, showing signs of wear and use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the piano's depth, the closed fallboard, and the round stool positioned in front.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full keyboard, closed fallboard, and the stool centered in front of the piano.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the piano's depth and the stool, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid, unadorned wooden back panel of the piano.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
